title: Type 1 Diabetes & CGM
description: CGM-based decision support, glycemic metrics for special populations (post-bariatric, pediatric), and meal detection algorithms combining glucose and heart rate signals.

title: Digital Twins
description: Retrospective glycemic simulation with ReplayBG to test therapeutic scenarios safely, identify optimal insulin dosing, and power patient education through experiential learning.

title: AI & LLMs for Clinical Support
description: Large language models for automatic AGP report interpretation, pattern summarization, and clinician-facing decision support interfaces co-designed with diabetologists.

title: Wearable Sensor Processing
description: End-to-end pipelines for smartwatch signals (HR, GSR, accelerometry): Bayesian adaptive filtering, feature extraction, and exploitation in predictive AI models for chronic diseases.

title: mHealth Platforms (IMPACT)
description: IMPACT — an integrated mobile platform for clinical trial management, multi-sensor data collection, remote patient monitoring, and digital twin integration.

title: Co-design of clinical solutions
description: Involvement of stakeholders during the development phases of clinical solutions with co-design workshops for grounding and tailoring solutions in real-life environment.
